name: Quick Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together all dry ingredients.
2. Blend well.
3. With a pastry blender, cut in shortening until evenly distributed.
4. The mixture should resemble cornmeal in texture.
5. Transfer to a large airtight container.
6. Label and store in a cool, dry place.
7. Use within 10 to 12 weeks.
